title: Payments chart: Period from July 2026 to June 2027 (2025 base year) - Canada.ca
content:
Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit

## Payments chart: Period from July 2026 to June 2027 (2025 base year)

## Single individual or single parent family
Adjusted family net income ($)
No children ($/Year)
4 children or more ($/Year)

## Married or Common-law
Adjusted family net income ($)
No children ($/Year)
4 children or more ($/Year)
- The amounts listed above represent a recipient's yearly entitlement for the CGEB based on their marital status, number of children and the adjusted family net income .
- The yearly entitlement for the 2025 base year is paid in 4 quarterly issuances every three months in July 2026 , October 2026 , January 2027 and April 2027 .
- These amounts are only to be used as a guideline.
- All recipients must keep the Canada Revenue Agency informed of any changes to their current address, family size or marital situation.
If you have a spouse or common-law partner, your adjusted net incomes are combined to get your adjusted family net income (AFNI).

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
